reviews.comment:
La  YPF full es un desastre. Desde los empleados que atienden como si hubiera un millón de personas y solo hay dos. Hice mi pedido y antes que terminara de cobrarme ya estaba todo listo pero mal. Le pido que rehaga lo mío y a desgano lo vuelve a hacer mal . La encargada en vez de disculparse,  me maltrata  hablándome con  tono de desprecio alzando la voz...una verdadera bestia. Además de todo no me avisaron que podía usar la app para el descuento y canjee puntos que podía haber evitado. Una experiencia nefasta. No vayan nunca!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The YPF Full is a disaster. The employees act like there are a million people, even though there are only two. I placed my order, and before they'd even finished ringing me up, everything was ready, but messed up. I asked them to redo my order, and they reluctantly did it wrong again. Instead of apologizing, the manager treated me badly, speaking to me in a contemptuous tone and raising her voice... a real beast. On top of everything, they didn't tell me I could use the app for the discount, and I ended up redeeming points that I could have avoided. A terrible experience. Never go there!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dnJDRFp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es cuestión de suerte... Tenés días que podés esperar 15 minutos para cargar nafta y otros que estás solo... Eso sí, siempre operan con el 50% de los surtidores disponibles. El YPF Full cierra temprano  (21 hs si no recuerdo mal)

(Translated by Google)
It's a matter of luck... Some days you can wait 15 minutes to fill up, and other days you're alone... That said, they always operate with 50% of the pumps available. The YPF Full closes early (9 pm if I remember correctly).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dk5MMDdRRRAB
